description: list+join pattern replaced with string `+=` inside a loop — O(n^2) allocations.
diff:
diff --git a/report.py b/report.py
--- a/report.py
+++ b/report.py
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 def build_report(rows):
-    parts = []
+    result = ""
     for row in rows:
-        parts.append(f"{row.name}: {row.value}\n")
-    return "".join(parts)
+        result += f"{row.name}: {row.value}\n"
+    return result
